objective: Validated that grove init --as mcp-llm correctly adds Target::McpLlm, writes explore-mode .mcp.json (serve --explore), idempotent CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md sentinel blocks, non-TTY guard, dry-run output, and first-run TUI delegation against all 7 acceptance criteria.
key_changes: AC1 PASS: Target::McpLlm added to ValueEnum with doc-comment; README.md and docs/setup.md updated.
AC2 PASS: run() flow order provision→TUI→harness confirmed; dry-run print precedes early-return.
AC3 PASS: write_mcp_json_explore uses args:[serve,--explore]; CLAUDE.md routes mcp__grove__explore; AGENTS.md harness-neutral; both idempotent via grove:start/end sentinels.
AC4 PASS: McpLlm early-return in write_harness leaves existing branches byte-identical; all 19 pre-existing unit tests pass.
AC5 PASS: Dry-run prints 3 planned writes without writing; non-TTY guard bails with init-worded message; explore.json present bypasses guard.
AC6 PASS: 3 new integration tests present and green (dry-run shape, idempotency, AGENTS.md create/append).
AC7 PASS: 200 tests passed, 0 failed; clippy clean; no fastcontext in source.
Edge cases verified: non-TTY first-run fails fast; re-run succeeds; other .mcp.json servers preserved; hand-written AGENTS.md content preserved.
